reviews.title: Arrived on time, in good shape.

reviews.title: Soft bristles are gentle on gums!
reviews.text: I loved Woobamboo! before, but this time bought the extra-soft bristled toothbrushes. They are wonderful! I'm a senior citizen, so a lot of toothbrushes are just too rough on my old gums. These gently clean my teeth, and an added bonus of being biodegradable. Made by a responsible company and affordable!

reviews.title: Worked out well for our Kits
reviews.text: Each year we put together kits for the unhomed.  These work well as they're individually packaged.  Would definitely buy again.  But would appreciate a discount of some kind to help us provide more kits in the future.

reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

title: Oral-B Sensitive Clean Electric Toothbrush Head with Clean & Care Technology, Extra Soft Bristles for Gentle Plaque Removal, Pack of 12, Suitable for Mailbox, White
description: As one of Oral-B’s premium replacement toothbrush heads, the Sensitive Clean features ultrathin bristles that are gentle on gums, combined with regular bristles that are tough on plaque. Sensitive Clean removes up to 100% more plaque and reduces gum inflammation by 100% compared to a manual toothbrush. The unique combination of end rounded and ultrathin bristles make Sensitive Clean ideal for everyone with a sensitive mouth and everyone who is looking for just a great gentle clean. Compatible with all Oral-B handles except Pulsonic & iO.
features: Easy delivery: 12 counts of Oral-B Sensitive Clean toothbrush head in a mailbox compatible and non-printed recyclable packaging
With Clean Maximiser technology, green bristles turn yellow when it is time to replace your brush head
Up to 100 Percent more plaque removal and healthier gums vs. a regular manual toothbrush
Oral-B’s best for whole mouth cleaning (excluding Oral-B iO)
Dentists recommend to change brush head every 3 months for the best clean

reviews.title: If you have sensitive gums, buy this OEM Oral-B Toothbrush Head vs Chinese After-Market
reviews.text: My wife has sensitive gums.  These OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads are much softer but still do the job vs supposedly equivalent "sensitive" Chinese After-Market heads.  While the Chinese after-market toothbrush heads are much cheaper, they contributed to my wife's $2,000. gum surgery.  I swapped back to OEM Oral-B brush heads and all is now good for her.  Live and learn I guess or, better yet, you get what you pay for.  Buy these OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads with confidence.

features: ✅ TRIPLE BRISTLE GO - Our travel friendly battery charged sonic toothbrush has a patented 3-sided brush head that gets the job done in 1/3 the time.
✅ REDUCES LEVELS OF PLAQUE, GUM SORENESS & BLEEDING - The easy to use 3 bristle head is perfectly angled to get in those hard-to-reach places.
✅ BATTERY OPERATED - The handle is equipped with compact compartment that holds two AA batteries (included).
✅ DENTIST CREATED & DENTIST APPROVED - Our unique brush design is revolutionizing the way we clean teeth and is recommended by Dentists across the United States.
✅ TOOTHBRUSH FOR EVERYONE - The slim easy-grip handle and quick yet effective brush head was made for EVERYONE!

reviews.title: If you eat food, you need this toothbrush.
reviews.text: This toothbrush is the best. It cleans better than Sonicare and is a fraction of the cost. The way the bristles clean all of the tooth surfaces at once is a game changer.

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: Just doesn't work good

reviews.title: It's okay...
reviews.text:
I wish I had bought the plug in triple bristle.
Doesn't seem nearly as strong as my sonic care.
Otherwise its awkward. Takes some getting used to. Doesn't do a good job on my bottom front teeth.
Meh. It's okay. Not the tooth car wash I was hoping to experience.

reviews.title: great for sensitive mouths!
reviews.text: I’m on the autism spectrum and my sensory issues around my mouth are so intense that I have had a lifelong phobia of the dentist. (I still go, I just have a a very anxious time.) my only complaint is that you definitely need the travel case because this thing turns itself on in your bag super easily and sounds like a marital aid. 😳

reviews.title: Unable to Install Batteries, having to return item
reviews.text: I was so excited to get my new toothbrush in the mail today but have been trying for the last 30 minutes to get the thing opened so batteries can be installed & it is next to impossible. It has a “open to install” & close, I have turned it to “open to install” it will not open, have even tried to pry it open with a knife to no avail. Instruction booklet does not touch battery installation. If I could get the batteries in - I’d probably LOVE the toothbrush, as it seems to be well made & comes with a tongue scraper/brush & 2 toothbrush heads. Purchased for autistic grandson who has trouble brushing his teeth, hoping to make things easier for his little life but this mimi is getting extra frustrated with the little “no grip” cap that won’t open for battery installation. Now have to go through the dreaded process of processing a return. On a good note, if you’re purchasing it for someone who is severely disabled - you won’t have to worry about them popping the battery compartment open & choking on the batteries because it “ain’t happening” as we say in the south. ***Update to review. Customer service is awesome. Made 1 phone call & they’ve called me back twice & sending a new system with preinstalled batteries. The one I got, must’ve been a fluke. Now updated to a 5star. Very well made. Has a 2 minute timer on it that can be set for children or someone with intellectual disability so they brush teeth for right amount of time. Nice system & wonderul customer service.

features: ✅ PREMIUM HARD CASE MATERIAL - Made to fit ONLY the Triple Bristle sonic toothbrushes. Compatible with the rechargeable and battery-operated toothbrushes. Our travel case is made with premium materials in a matte texture. Very lightweight which is easy to carry with you anywhere you go. Your brush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on.
✅ KEEP YOUR BRUSH CLEAN AND DRY - Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure. Each toothbrush travel case can hold one toothbrush, extra brush head and tongue cleaner.

✅ PROPERLY DESIGNED PORTABLE & DURABLE - Toothbrush case is convenient to carry, perfect for travel. Take your brush to work, to the gym, in your purse or even in your glove box in the car. Put the toothbrush case in your suitcase or bag. Great for business trips, traveling, school, camping and away from your home.

✅ COMPACT & HYGENIC - Easy to clean and maintain, keeps your toothbrushes clean and dry in a healthy environment. High-quality plastic case, sturdy, slim, and easy to carry. Dust-proof and moisture-proof protects the toothbrush. Save space in your purse, carry-on, or travel toiletry bag. Rounded corner design will not scratch other items in your bag.

✅ SLEEK TOOTHBRUSH CASE – This 10” x 1.5” x 2.5” case comes in two vibrant colors – blue and pink. The case and zipper are embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth to sport the Triple Bristle lifestyle in a sleek and elegant way.
✅ TRIPLE BRISTLE FAMILY OF PRODUCTS - Check out our line of sonic toothbrushes with our patented 3 head brush design for a faster more reliable clean!

✅ A CASE WITH A PURPOSE - It's a toothbrush case with a purpose: to protect your toothbrush from the elements, while letting you take it everywhere you go without worrying about what might happen to it.

The reusable, clear travel case features ventilation holes and a cap to keep your toothbrush clean and dry wherever you take it or store it. features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Huge Brush Head, Might Take Some Getting Used To.
reviews.text: I got these in the mail today and am mixed on them.  For one, I was instructed to do more brushing along the gum line for gum health, so these seem perfect.  I also really like that they are super soft bristles and are pretty gentle on that gum line, however, the brush head is huge and takes a little getting used to.  I have a big mouth and kind of wonder how this would work on a child or petit adult.  I was very happy with the brushing I got and I think I will be using these brushes exclusively in the coming months and will see how they went, once the coronavirus lockdown is over and dentists are back to work.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text:
These were very cute!

I was pleased with these toothbrushes. I think they did a good job at getting my daughter's teeth cleaned. They felt good in her mouth. I thought they worked well.

I have been happy with this brand. We have bought dental products for a long time. They were easy to use. Teeth felt good after it. They last a while. They are a quality product. I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Will Take Getting Used To...
reviews.text: I was interested in trying out these toothbrushes, which I've had recommended to me by a couple of friends.  They're definitely weird in the beginning.  When you're used to a bit of coverage as you brush, having the thin strip down the middle and then on either side is a little odd.  I kept feeling like I had to rotate the brush more, which. might be a good thing?  It seems to clean as well as my normal toothbrush, but it is going to take time to be comfortable with.

reviews.title: Great beginner toothbrush
reviews.text: Great beginner toothbrush! The bristles are really soft so great for someone just getting started. I used one in my almost 5 yr old and the other on my almost 2 year old. Both worked great and were soft enough for them.

reviews.title: Super soft!
reviews.text: I have a niece that hates brushing, and doing so is a pain. The design of this is unique. It has a V shaped head to reach the teeth and gums at the same time. Comes in a pack of 2 so the two will last six months. Has a wider handles for little hands.

reviews.title: great deal
reviews.text: Really cannot pick because of the price. Item as described and came with a very simple bib. These work as awesome teethers for my twins but in order to make it work for toothbrushing independence, you do need a cooperative toddler who's willing to bite down and keep the teeth between the brushes. If your kids are willing to bite down and brush with these, they work great for encouraging toddlers to maintain healthy dental hygiene. I think it's already awesome for the price and works great as a teether.

title: evowera Smart Manual Toothbrush Age 9+, Uncleaned Area Reminder, Pressure Reminder, Coaching App, Timer, Color Display, WiFi Compatible, Soft Bristle, Message Function, BPA Free, Kids Toothbrush, Blue
features: 【Uncleaned Reminder Helps Build Kids' Habit】Kids can view their cleaned and uncleaned area from the color screen of the smart toothbrush, no app or phone is required. This toothbrush not only guides them to brush with 100% coverage but also coaches them to build better brushing habits.

【Pressure Reminder Protects Kids Gums】Kids don't know they're brushing too hard? This smart toothbrush will notice and remind them by real-time vibration and flashing screens. A great manual toothbrush that helps your kids brush better and protects teeth and gums.

【Smart App for Tracking And Guidance】Parents can track the kids' brushing reports from the smart toothbrush and know whether they brushing thoroughly and for enough time. It will also generate daily, weekly, monthly, and annual personalized guidance to help kids maintain good oral hygiene practices.

【WiFi Compatible for Fun Interaction】Our smart toothbrush supports WiFi connection, you can track kids' brushing performance anytime and anywhere via the internet even if you're not at home. You can also send a fun message to the toothbrush to encourage kids to become better brushers.

reviews.title: The more data the better!
reviews.text: A smart toothbrush is an excellent idea! It works and there isn’t enough data when it comes to tooth brushing. It’s helpful to know exactly where to focus, excellent idea for kids. The app works and is easy to find.

reviews.title: Useless don’t buy
reviews.text: This thing is useless.

reviews.title: Pretty cool motivator for kids
reviews.text:
As the product is named, it's a manual toothbrush, so just be sure you're not expecting anything electric here. It still does involve technology as the toothbrush has a display that yields information, such as how long you've been brushing and other messages on your performance. The real feature though is that the toothbrush has a blue sensor in it which you use to connect to an app which gets information on how long you brushed, which areas, if you pressed the brush too hard on your teeth or gums, etc., and spits out a brushing report.

We thought moving to an electric toothbrush would motivate our daughter to brush more a few years ago, and it did, but the results were limited. As she's 8, and at an age where she's really becoming a bookworm, she likes reading the brushing reports and it motivates her to brush herself.

As I said the brush is manual, and obviously the bristles will wear down with time, so the head of the brush is detachable and can be replaced for $3.50 for a set of 2 (price as of January 9, 2023). Obviously, you don't want to buy a whole new brush with technology in it every time the bristles get weaker.

I'm glad this one is getting my daughter to understand to brush correctly and she wants to do it regularly to see how she's doing.

reviews.title: Cool concept to make brushing fine, interactive, and technologically appealing!
reviews.text: This seems like a really neat way to keep track of and encourage brushing teeth. Bluetooth connects to phone and functions via the app you have to download, so in order to use and track, you need to be near the connected phone or tablet. Looking forward to setting it up for my niece to use when she visits.

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

description: Ergonomic Design: The brush is designed to give your child a better grip; It has soft, end-rounded bristles that protect the gums and enamel of the teeth; It comes with 4 different Blippi holographic caps Brushing Fun: Adults will appreciate the quality and price point, kids will love the fun details and array of characters including the Shopkins, Garfield, and Kung Fu Panda plus Papa Smurf, Smurfette, Jojo Siwa Electric, Manual, Novelty: Explore oral hygiene products including dental floss, travel toothbrushes, soft and medium toothbrush heads, baby finger toothbrushes, and options for toddlers, kids, and adult Toothbrushes for Kids: Have fun brushing with fun licensed characters; Find the best kids toothbrush heads, electric toothbrushes for kids, kids toothbrush holders, toothbrush covers, and kids toothbrush sets Oral Health: Help clean teeth and freshen bad breath while fighting cavities and plaque with Brush Buddies; Get toothbrush packs, replacement heads, travel sets, denture care, mouthwash, flossers, and more

reviews.title: Perfect size for tiny mouths!
reviews.text:
These are perfect toddler or little kid sized toothbrushes. It’s nice to have 4 of them since kids don’t always use them at the sink. Some how they get into rooms or cars if we are in a hurry right? Also good to have a backup one ready if the toilet is near the sink and it “accidentally” falls in lol. This was part of a birthday present we sent to our niece that turned 5. I like to give something practical, something educational, and something fun!
Every time I purchase something online, I always check the reviews. I count on others to help me choose the best option. My reviews are always my honest opinion and I try to include photos if possible.
If my review has helped you in any way, please click the "helpful" button below so that I know! If you have any questions feel free to ask! Thank you!

title: COSLUS Kids Sonic Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush: Interactive Smart LED Light Toddler Silicone Tooth Brush (Bluelue)
features: 🌟INTERACTIVE FUN BRUSHING: Featuring cute cartoon character design and rainbow LED lights, COSLUS electric toothbrush makes brushing more fun and easier for boys and girls ages 3+. Your children will be rewarded with a star after each successful brushing, which can motivate them to collect all the stars, fall in love with brushing teeth, and enjoy endless fun with cute characters. Studies show that 93% of parents prefer an interactive toothbrush to develop their child's healthy brushing habits

⏰BUILDS HEALTHY BRUSHING HABITS: Based on the professional advice of brushing teeth twice a day for two minutes each time, COSLUS toothbrush sets the smart timer to 2min and lightly vibrates every 30 seconds to remind child to switch to another part of the teeth, thoroughly clean their oral, and develop correct habits. Meanwhile, our toothbrush has 3 cleaning modes with memory function: deep clean, soft clean and massage, you can choose the right mode according to your child's needs

✔️GENTLE & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Created in partnership with thousands of Professionals, COSLUS kids toothbrush is safe, effective and gentle on incoming teeth and sensitive gums. Ultra-low vibration, children will not feel numb when using. What's more, this toothbrush vibrates up to 31000 times/min, 100% more powerful than ordinary electric toothbrushes. And Come with 2 toothbrush heads: 1 soft bristle for sensitive gums, 1 standard bristle for deep cleaning

🎁Designed For Kids' Oral Development: The unique caterpillar-shaped silicone handle is comfortable and non-slip, more suitable for children's small hands. And widened tongue brush head is made of food-grade silicone to massage kids' tongue while cleaning effectively. In addition, the lock-type design can better prevent brush head from falling off, allowing kids to brush more safely independently. With IPX7 waterproof design, your children can directly rinse and soak it with water after brushing

⚡90 Days Long Endurance: This rechargeable kids electric toothbrush lasts up to 90 days after 2.5 hours of wireless charging, more convenient and faster. It highly reduces the hassle of frequent charging and battery replacement, easy to use at home and on the go. In addition, the average lifespan of our electric toothbrush is approximately 3 years, which is double the lifespan compared to other electric toothbrush

Tips: It is recommended to replace the brush head every three months. ---You can check the related information on the box, get 3 replacement brush heads --- Or buy other brush head sets at the COSLUS store to better experience this electric toothbrush

reviews.title: My grandson actually wants to brush now.
reviews.text:
This brush is fun, and my grandson actually wants to brush since we picked it up.

Brush vibrates quietly, bristles are stationary. As you brush the stars light up.
The goal is to brush long enough to get all the stars lit up.
When you change something into a game, it motivates kids to try to "win".

I like the concept. Charger and extra brush head included.

reviews.title: Great for my daughters toothbrush
reviews.text: We got the actual toothbrush a few months back and although it came with an extra head we wanted to be prepared because it is the only toothbrush my daughter likes to use.  They came packaged just fine and we got all three in perfect shape.  They are like her old heads for the toothbrush, not too hard and not too soft and they fit perfectly.  As long as my daughter still enjoys her specific tooth brush I will keep getting these for her.

title: Solodent Toothbrush Ultra Soft, Silver & Gold for Sensitive Teeth and Gums (Pack of 1) Colors May Vary
description: Enjoy the unprecedented, professional-like, cleaning experience of all-in-one Multi-Action Solodent SILVER SERIES Toothbrushes. Flossing Slim Ultra Soft Bristles gently clean hard to reach areas, between the teeth, under the gum line, and save tooth enamel from abrasion. They softly stimulate sensitive gums without bleeding or pain. Extra Soft Bristles make this toothbrush perfect for those with gum recession, sensitive teeth, exposed roots, implants and braces. Silver infused embossed PBT bristles naturally fight and minimize bacterial growth on bristles and keep them clean between uses. Innovative Patented 3D Embossed PBT Bristles are designed to gently and effectively remove maximum plaque due to multitouch contacts to tooth surfaces. Actual Gold infused bristles. PBT (polybutylene terephthalate) bristles are more durable and less water-absorbent than traditional nylon bristles and outlast them by 50%. Beautiful patent pending diamond pattern design and ergonomic handle. Designed by a dentist. Made in South Korea.
